scope: Triton active compressed-group mask/count plus compact-list probe for actual LightningIndexer routes.
read: The D16 compressed-dKV accumulator needs a compact active compressed-group list, not only per-panel flags/counts. This probe adds a Triton pack kernel that converts active flags into sorted per-query-tile active-group lists and counts. Exact parity passes at S128 and S4096. On the hard S4096 layer-2 CR4/topk512 route, flags+pack costs 0.848 ms and pack-only costs 0.0356 ms, so the full route-compaction metadata path is still below 1 ms. The remaining wall is the D16 dKV accumulator and LI/compressor fusion.

interpretation.positive: The complete dynamic route-compaction metadata path, including compact active-group list creation, is not the sparse-attention backward wall.
interpretation.negative: This still does not compute score/probability recompute, dQ, or compressed dKV. It only produces the compact route list that the next D16 accumulator should consume.
interpretation.next_step: Implement a compressed-dKV D16 accumulator that consumes active_groups/active_counts per query tile, then compare compressed-only S4096 timing against the current 8.29 ms global dKV accumulation wall and the 4.73 ms pure-BF16 materialized flat-GEMM floor.
